description: Letter from a merchant, who had been out of work for a year and a half and suffered heavy losses, to an unnamed individual into whose family he had recently married. The writer expresses regret at the change to his own character and requests from the addressee, “something that would cover at least part of my expenses.” (S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society, 5:242, 573) EMS
description_he: מכתב מסוחר שהיה ללא עבודה שנה וחצי וסבל הפסדים כבדים, לאדם שנכנס לא מזמן לקשר משפחתי עמו. הכותב מבקש 'משהו שיכסה לפחות חלק מהוצאותי'.
